productDisplayName: Puma Women's Future Cat M1 White Blue Shoe
description: Designed for everyday wear, this range of puma sneakers for women embodies excitement and energy for life. The Future cat pair comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a denim finish. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear.Upper Features a low-profile design made for wear and tear Premium leather upper for longer wear Bold, contrasting formstripe outlining Lightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfort Asymmetrical lacing system gives a snug Fit Textile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfort Synthetic overlays on the heel cup with a denim look for maximum style Rubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorption Midsole Cushioned midsole for comfort and stability Future cat logo shield on the forefoot Outsole Rubber outsole for enhanced traction Embedded puma Future Cat embedded on the rubber outsole
